privileged_info_summary: The task involves organizing 64 synthetic wedding guests into tables with maximum capacity of 8 per table. The guest list contains one Wedding Party of 8 members (must be at Table 1 exclusively), plus 12 additional family/group units. Success requires: all guests assigned, no capacity violations, Wedding Party at Table 1 exclusively, at least 80% of families seated together (10 out of 13 multi-member families), a summary table in F2:G2 with proper headers and at least 3 COUNTIF formulas. The task has a 180-second timeout, 20-step limit, and requires 70% pass threshold (4 out of 6 success criteria).
